{{CargoRelic
|name=White Satin Sachet
|class_id=20106
|rank=Green
|affct=CIV
|source=
|description=This is a sachet used to store herbs, with a white satin base and silk thread embroidery along the edges. The front is made of dark blue floral silk with embroidered flower and plant patterns using gold thread, giving it a lifelike appearance. The back is double-layered blue cotton fabric, tightly fixed with a technique called "inverted three-needle", where the silk thread and fabric are closely integrated. It is a testament to the wisdom and hard work of ancient Chinese laboring people.
|fame=15
|art=14
|fth=17
|civ=31
|tech=13
|ss1=Per God of Culture Descent, Snail DEF +1<br>God of Culture Descended: 40/40
|ss2=Per God of Culture Descent, Snail DEF +2<br>God of Culture Descended: 40/40
|ss3=Per God of Culture Descent, Snail DEF +3<br>God of Culture Descended: 40/40
|ss4=Per God of Culture Descent, Snail DEF +3<br>God of Culture Descended: 40/40
|ss7=Per God of Culture Descent, Snail DEF +3<br>God of Culture Descended: 40/40<br> (Awakened)
}}
